userOutfits.errorNoUserId: Could not determine the User ID from the page.

donationLink.description:
This will launch "PLS DONATE" where you can give an offline donation.

Due to fees from Roblox (30%) and the game (10%), the user receives 60% of the donated amount.

Upon joining, the "Offline Donations" UI will appear with their username pre-filled. Simply click the gift button to open their stand and purchase a gamepass to donate.

instantJoiner.description:
This will automatically attempts to join the user as soon as they get into an experience.

This requires the user to have their joins enabled for everyone or for you to be friends with them.
instantJoiner.searchPlaceholder: Search for an experience or enter a Place ID (Optional)

rap.rolimonsRedirect:
You are about to be redirected to {{username}}'s profile on Rolimon's, an external website for trading and item values.

Do you want to continue?

This shows if Roblox thinks your account is your first account.
This info comes directly from Roblox but may not be accurate.

pendingRobux.tooltip: This is an estimate of how many Robux from your pending balance will become available tomorrow, based on your transaction data. The actual amount may vary. And this may be inaccurate.
pendingRobux.insufficientDataTooltip: Not enough transaction history to make an accurate estimate. Please wait for more transactions to complete.
pendingRobux.label: Unpending Robux tomorrow

totalEarned.allScanned: All earning records have been scanned.

totalSpent.pausedMessage: Calculation paused. Resume to continue counting.
totalSpent.description: Select a mode to calculate your transaction history.
totalSpent.errorRetries: Failed after multiple retries. Last error: {{error}}

info.title: RoValra Information!
info.desc1: RoValra is an extension that's trying to make basic quality of life features free and accessible to everyone, by making everything completely open-source.
info.desc2: This is possible by running almost everything locally.
info.desc3: And the server side features doesn't cost me anything to run which is why I can afford to make this free.
info.desc4: This extension is also a project to learn, so a lot of stuff might change or get reworked overtime as I learn more.
info.suggestions: If you have any feature suggestions please let me know in my Discord server or via GitHub
info.bugs: If you find any bugs let me know in my Discord server or via GitHub
info.review: If you like this extension please consider leaving a review, it helps a lot ❤️

credits.title: RoValra Credits!
credits.contributed: Thanks to everyone who contributed
credits.frames: Thanks to Frames for somehow getting the Roblox sales and revenue on some items
credits.julia: Thanks to Julia for making a repo with all Roblox server datacenters which I used to use to get the regions, but now I switched to my own api.
credits.aspect: Thanks to Aspect for helping me out here and there when I had a bunch of dumb questions or problems.
credits.l5se: Thanks to l5se for allowing me to use their open source region selector as a template for my extension.
credits.lz: Thanks to 7_lz for helping me a bunch when preparing for the Chrome Web Store release. They helped a ton and I'm very thankful.
credits.mmfw: Thanks to mmfw for making the screenshots on the chrome web store, and general help with UI design of the extension.
credits.coweggs: Thanks to Coweggs for coming up with the very funny name that is "RoValra" as a joke that I then ended up using.
credits.woozynate: Thanks to WoozyNate for making the amazing game called fisch, which is where Gilbert (the logo) is from <3

donatorPerks.title: Donator Perks!
donatorPerks.subtitle: Support RoValra's development and get exclusive perks!
donatorPerks.howToGetDesc: You can donate by purchasing a gamepasses in the support game.
donatorPerks.note: Note: Badges may take a few minutes to appear after donation. To manage badge visibility, go to the 'Profile' settings tab. Importantly if you are under the age of 13 and donate you won't be able to toggle the visiblity of your donator badge. Donating through commissions sadly won't give a donator perks, this is a Roblox limitation.

botDetector.tooltip: Bots are accounts running automated scripts to farm items. A single user can sometimes run 50+ bots. Keep in mind that this is not a fault of the game developers. This information can be inaccurate if an experience is mainly played by new Roblox accounts.
botDetector.lotsOfBots: {{gameName}} has a lot of bots
botDetector.someBots: {{gameName}} has some bots but mostly real players

antiBots.noPermission: You do not have permission to ban or kick members.
antiBots.confirmBan: You are about to ban {{count}} member(s). They will be permanently blocked.
antiBots.confirmKick: You are about to kick {{count}} member(s). They can rejoin anytime.
antiBots.banReminder: Reminder: Verify bot scores before banning.
antiBots.scoreImpact: This will select approximately 0 members.

revertLogo.downloadInstructions: Just follow the steps below to install Roblox. Download should start in a few seconds. If it doesn't, restart the download.
revertLogo.step1: Once downloaded, double-click the RobloxPlayerInstaller.exe file in your Downloads folder.
revertLogo.step2: Double-click the RobloxPlayerInstaller to install the app.
revertLogo.step3: Follow the instructions to install Roblox to your computer.
revertLogo.step4: Now that it’s installed, join the experience.
revertLogo.scanCode: Scan this code with your phone's camera to get Roblox.
